title: deinandra increscens subsp. increscens
intro: Deinandra increscens subsp. increscens, also known as California tarweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Deinandra increscens subsp. increscens include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible antiseptic properties to prevent infection. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
